message:
fix(html-export): Consistent pretty-printing for tool call JSON in HTML export

- Use serde_json::to_string_pretty() consistently for objects/arrays in:
  - Cursor format: tool_output (was using compact JSON)
  - Claude format: tool_use input (was using compact JSON)
  - Claude format: tool_result content (was using compact JSON)
- Unified check order: object/array first, then string, then fallback
- Improves readability of JSON in collapsible tool call sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
